name: Sinomach Precision Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Sinomach Precision Industry Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells special bearings and relevant parts in China. The company offers petroleum machinery, precision, slewing, wind turbine, special precision, automotive, hydrodynamic, one-way, spherical roller, standard ball, and taper roller bearing products, as well as bearings for rolling mills and rail transportation. It also provides spindles; precision bearing instruments that include bearing parts measuring instruments, finished bearing measuring instruments, air-floating and dense-ball spindles, induction heaters, and degaussing equipment; bearing testing machines; and bearing manufacturing machines. In addition, the company offers bearing relevant materials, such as ZYS bearing steel products, ceramic balls and carbide balls, steel ball products, cemented carbide cutting tool tips, bearing antirust lubricating oil and grease products, and bearing cage materials. Further, it provides abrasion-resistant materials that comprise overall abrasion-resistant alloy replacement parts and duplex metal composite guide products. The company's products are used in various industries, such as aviation, spaceflight, vessel, weapon, mining, metallurgy, wind turbine generator, machine tool, machinery, medical treatment, automobile, rail transport, etc. The company was formerly known as Luoyang Bearing Science & Technology Co.,Ltd and changed its name to Sinomach Precision Industry Co., Ltd. in December 2020. Sinomach Precision Industry Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Luoyang, China.
